[gr.getDisplayValue(\"acceptance_date\"),gr.getDisplayValue(\"offer_type\"),gr.getDisplayValue(\"offer_status\"),gr.getDisplayValue(\"installment_amount\")];choices.push(fields);}return 0){outMsg = vaSystem.renderTable(title, headers, data);} else{outMsg.setTextPart(gs.getMessageLang(\"There are currently no reminders associated with this customer.\",
